text:

They never settled well, so there is a complete lack of back support. We have only used them three times and they are far from comfortable. More beautiful than in the photo. Very nice heavy material. A little hard to get on, but very worth it.

Doesnt live up to the hype. Love the idea and design but towels don’t stay warm and have a smell I can’t explain. I’ve had to heat the towels and then heat them again for warmth. Once heated, that warmth is gone FAST! I was expecting fresh out of the dryer warmth. That’s not the case here.

I really love good white noise and sleep with a fan sound every night. And I’ve seen reviews of purifiers in the past that claimed they were too loud, and I thought that wouldn’t ever be an issue for me personally. But this purifier annoys me. The sound isn’t a good white noise. It’s more of a hum. And even level 2 is way too loud to be running while I’m working from home in the same room. The small light on this is obnoxiously bright too, so at night, even after putting it on the night setting, I have to put a pack of gum over the light to cover it up. I can easily sleep with a normal lamp or bathroom light on, but this light is unnecessarily harsh. I’m not even sure why it needs a light at all really. So even though I love how the filter is only supposed to be changed yearly (as opposed to the every 4 month replacements on the Filtrete Large Room with True Hepa purifier I have), I find it too annoying to use at night or past level 1 during the day. I do enjoy the Filtrete one from Amazon though and it has great reviews at a reasonable price. And it’s not loud or overly bright. I’d recommend checking it out!
This thing tried to electrocute me last night! I will be reporting this to consumer safety.
The box looks nicer than the pictures.  I would definitly buy it again.
LOVE IT!!!!! I had a smaller set of cuisinart that had just a 10" skillet...can't even compare to the 12"!! It's nice and deep enough to make just about anything in!

Very cute gnome that's taller and fatter than I expected--and I love it. I almost missed the strings; they come separately (I thought they were already part of the gnome) and they're easy to miss. The gnome came without a shipping box and was delivered in just the product box. Thankfully it wasn't stolen. Inside was the gnome wrapped in just a clear plastic bag. I took the gnome out and tossed the box and bag. Out of the bag, the gnome (branches) were flat against the belly, so I stretched them out. Be very careful! The branches are just glued to the fabric and not very well glued; a couple came out before I realized how delicate I had to be. I couldn't find the lights, so I thought they weren't included. I almost messaged the seller until I thought to check the box again. Nothing was in the box, so I checked the bag again. The bag was weightless, but then I spotted the clear lights. They're super clear and super light, so I missed them the first time. They're easy to wrap around the gnome and take two AAA batteries (not included, mind you).
Picture was not as pretty as the one shone in the advertisement and the frame was broken upon delivery .
Made very cheap. Thin

These are iron on stickers that look like absolute garbage! So cheaply made so embarrassing do recommend!
I love this fan! Very small and easy to transport! The only issue is there is a little blue light that shines when it’s turned on and its ridiculously bright! I put a sock around it!

I usually try to read descriptions prior to purchase. It cuts down on the disappointment. In this case however the descriptors were misleading. This is NOT a good Ottoman. Not even a good pouf. I bought this to setup a study room. The rod is sturdy. It is keeping my curtain up great. However, because the rod uses a hole by hole sizing method. It may not fit because each hole is separated by an 1inch. So if ur wall is 100.5inches. It is meant for 99in to 100in.
It is a easy fix though. I grabbed a small piece of wood and placed it between the wall and rod. Now it fits perfectly and is very sturdy.
Cheap doesn’t hold up well! Doesn’t come with any screws or anything ‼️

I carry only water in this bottle. I've dropped it many times. However, the bottle is strong and never leaks. To clean it I have a brush on a stick. Water is easy to drink out of. Happy with my order. Fits in my cup holder for hyundai sonata.
The faux plant met expectations.  It doesn't have the "plastic" look, that some fake plants do.  The plant is well attached to the base, and off center.

Why is it so hard to find a decent pillow? There are no computer bits, no coding, no moving parts. We can send a man to mars but building a decent pillow is beyond our skill?
They are either too firm, or too soft, too lumpy, not lumpy enough. Too much support..not enough support.
In this case..even with the goring these pillows are WAY TOO SOFT for side sleeping. Your head will sink right down. Even stacking them creates this lumpy soft gooey mount you just cant pound enough to get comfy.
Guess I will continue tilting at the pillow windmill cuz I just know there has to be a decent pillow out there that doesnt cost more than a kitchen aide.

I bought this to make my wife a study area. The curtain was the color I expected. The material not too heavy and the rings are solid. Only thing I wish is if the rings were slightly bigger. It would make it easier to close and open the curtain.

Have not used it. Arrived to late for the batch of ravs we had to make 7 dozen by hand. Will try it next time.

Sadly my hubby put it through a dishwasher and that then caused the metal tray to bleed gray color marks on my dough.

This one will never. See water!

These work great! Live the different sizes!

I’ve used a handful of espresso machines over the past few years ranging from cheap to expensive. This machine falls in the middle of both taste and price.
This machine is easy to use once you find the settings and pods you like, which took me about a month of trial and error. It heats up quickly and is pretty portable. You can get pretty consistent results, which is also nice. But the taste of the espresso and the milk foam simply don’t compare to my manual Gaggia Classic. I can get much better results from an extra 5 minutes with my Gaggia and quality espresso beans. Most pods I tried tasted bitter or weak until I found the single origin Rosabaya de Colombia, which has a decent flavor. I also struggled with the size of the Nespresso shots and the volume of milk. Whereas it’s simple to make a 16oz latte with a few tablespoons of espresso beans and my Gaggia, I found that using two Nespresso pods is a must to make a drink that size with the Creatista. I do one Ristretto shot and one Espresso shot to get enough espresso volume for a 16oz drink, but that makes the cost per drink upwards of $2. I was actually fairly impressed with the quality of the milk from the Creatista, but my main issue was the temperature. Even on its hottest setting the milk only got to 155 degrees. I typically manually froth my milk with my Gaggia to 160-170 degrees, which is about as hot as possible before giving it a burnt taste.
Overall I did find this machine superior to a Saeco super automatic machine I’ve tried that was three times as expensive. The display is simpler and the milk was better with this Creatista. If you can get over the cost of the pods and absolutely need to save another 5 minutes for each drink, this is the way to go. For me, I’d rather put in the extra time for a superior taste and lower cost.

This fan is the size of your hand.  Suitable only on a desk to blow in your face.  It s quiet and blows a little air.  Don't expect much.  This is NOT an air conditioner by any stretch of the imagination.
Beautiful Carrara marble with a cork backing to protect furniture.

I wanted to try this because I take sandwiches for lunch every day and feel bad using a ziplock bag for each one. I really wanted to like these reusable bags, but they have been hard to get used to. They are pretty big, with thick sides that don’t fold over like a plastic bag would. That, plus the airtight seal, means that it takes up a lot more space in my lunchbox. Also, I am used to eating my sandwich out of the bag, like a wrapper, but this silicon bag is too bulky to use in the same way. Last, it is annoying to wash at the end of every day.

On the plus side, the seal is very good. I wouldn’t try to use it for liquids, but it is definitely airtight.
Using in my kitchen for draining sponges.  Suction cups hold ok.  Love the look and design, plastic is ok.  Overall happy.
Beautiful! I have gold flatware china so these match perfectly

Update: After a month of use, this pump gets stuck more often than not and is hard to pump. I will be searching for a different brand.

This looks good on my soap bottle and fits perfectly. The straw was easy to cut to size. However, we are flying through our dish soap much faster than we were before our old pump broke. It’s like someone at the soap factory got together with someone at the pump factory and decided to rip off the American public. The straw on this pump is much thicker and it is very hard to get a half pump of soap. Sometimes I can get a half pump if I use both hands and have one stabilizing the jar, but the point of me having a pump is to be able to get my dish soap easily with one hand. Most of the time the pump needs a decent amount of force to push down and a lot of soap comes flying out. I need to keep searching for a better one that still looks nice but doesn’t waste soap!

I got two orders of these stools. The first two stools were easy to assemble. They each took about 10-15 minutes to assemble. They seem very sturdy. When I got to the third stool, there were many issues. First, there was a piece that had the peg holes and screw holes swapped, so the pegs were too big to fit in the screw holes. Second, the bars that go across the legs at the footrest were cut at an angle in the wrong direction, so they didn't fit correctly, which created a gap at the bottom and top where the leg attaches to the seat. There was also a little damage on the stool seat. I'll get a paint pen to fix the damage on the seat, but I'm going to need to contact Amazon about getting these parts replaced, if they can do that.

Because of the material, it can get pretty hard to clean. I've tossed this in the washer a couple times but the contents remain there. I have to tug at them to get them off.

it was gifted.

Sucks!

However after the 2nd month. The paw prints started to peel off. The bottom layer is still stuck but the top layer is peeling off 1 by 1.

Looked great initially after sucking the air out of the bag with the vacuum. The seal did not hold very long. I put bag under my bed and had trouble pulling it out a week later because air got back into the bag and puffed back up.

The product is well built and only took half an hour or less to put together. But, add to that another 45 minutes, scissors, broken finger nails, screwdrivers, razor blades and a glass of wine (bad combination of course) to get the screws etc out. They're vacuum sealed on a cardboard backing, but after you cut each from the cardboard, they're each again vacuum packed around each item, which makes it impossible to cut them out.

I'm able to lift up the finished product meaning its lightweight.

This thing has been pretty useful but sometimes jars are just too tight even with this thing. I found a solution to this problem I got a jar key it releases the pressure and then I can use this thing. I recommend to the older people to get this item and a jar key.

This is an amazing product. I've recently started drinking tea and my son recommended this. Wow. All I do is fill the kettle with water and turn it on and it's ready lickity split. It takes like 1-2 mins to heat up. It's an absolute steal at the price. Highly highly highly recommend.
Got for present . Looks beautiful

My 5 and 6 year old both LOVE Star Wars. I was so excited to try these out and thought we would all love them, but we just don’t. First and foremost, they are weird sizes. They are really too big. The “sandwich” one is more like a Ziploc quart sized bag, which is WAY too big for any sort of snack for my kids. I tried sending goldfish in one and my son said he didn’t want to use the bag again. The large one is huge, I’m really not sure what I would use it for. Maybe if I was packing 4 sandwiches all together for my family, but that rarely happens. Second, the designs are really just ok. They are not super bright or vivid and just kinda blend in to the bag. Both of those combined with how crazy expensive they are, I would pass on these. I saw the same designs yesterday on glass Pyrex at Costco for $20 for 4 jars with lids, and I thought about it for a moment but then ended up skipping those as well because of the designs.
Says you can use a battery pack to run this. That is not true. I returned this.

They sent me fake fur! I’ve been in fashion for years I know the difference. $60 wasted on synthetic garbage. I’m so disappointed! It’s not soft or natural. They put a plastic fake blue pleather backing on it. It’s gross. Total RIP-OFF! I will return it!
Great colors very soft

I’ve been through several different pillows over the past few years and this one has been my favorite so far. I’ve been using it for a couple of weeks now and I’m not going to go back to my old one.

I sleep on both my side and on my back and this pillow works well for me. It is not too tall and doesn’t compress flat when I lay on it. Also, I don’t need to fluff it each night like I did with my others. Previously I had two different types of synthetic pillows and a shredded memory foam pillow. I much prefer this solid memory foam one. It seems like it will hold its shape well. Those other pillows flattened out pretty quickly.

These feel terribly cheap. I figured with so many good reviews they must be good, but they just feel so cheap and thin and small. Threads are shedding all over and they’re a bit scratchy too. The only way I could imagine them holding up for a year or two is just because there are so many of them. I will be using them for nice rags, not kitchen hand towels like I had hoped.
Amazing scent! Love it!

It’ll hold maybe a bowl’s worth and that’s it! These are completely useless and are being returned. Oh, they’re incredibly overpriced as well. Save your money and look elsewhere.

Do not recommend
They work as advertised.
This has been great! I love that it locks on to cans and stays on. Our last opener was so hard to turn! This is smooth and easy to use.

It certainly is cute and fun though if your main goal isn’t keeping a drink cold for as long as possible.
I thought it was stained glass, it’s all metal 😂😭 chain wasn’t even connected. It’s still cute but not what I was expecting.

I bought these because it is summer and what is the best thing to make in the summer? Sangria. Stirring a pitcher of Sangria however is a pain. I thought to get some plastic pitchers so I could just shake to mix & voila! Sangria at the ready. They are a good size for a single wine bottle with room to spare for the fruit. The only problem is the lid. If you make a red Sangria you'll want to pour over grass or a sink because the spout isn't the best.
A little over a year old and all of the legs have bent outward to the point it is not usable. Not sturdy at all.

This served me well for a while, but one day the lid got stuck and things went downhill from there. There were many times where I locked the lid and couldn't take it off no matter how hard I tried, or the top of the lid would just come off, leaving the rest of it still stuck on the blender. When it happened the other day, I saw there was were layers of old caked up milk all over it. (I often make frappuccinos,) This is supposed to be an easy clean up where you put hot water and soap in the blender and run it for a minute. Well, it gets the outside, but clearly not the inside. I had to wash all of the pieces three times before it got clean. I was able to put it back together and it works, but I ended up buying a different blender to replace it. I'll use this one as my backup, but that's only because I don't want to trash it.

Update 8/22 after a few months of use 4-5 times per week:
The pan is still very non stick, the pan hardly has signs of wear. I’ve only used wooden/plastic utensils in it and there are a few light scratches on the bottom of the pan, but they haven’t damaged the non stick coating and are not even apparent enough to be captured well with a picture. I have noticed browning underneath the handle from the gas flame. It doesn’t bother me and doesn’t come off, but it may bother some!!

Original review:
So far I’ve made fried rice, eggs, one pot pasta, and cooked chicken and sausage in this pan. Not a single bit has stuck even though I like to take minimal oil while cooking! Also cleaning the pot has been super easy, both because nothing has stuck to it in the first place, and because the pan is pretty lightweight. I like the fun colors and have been enjoying this pan. It doesn’t feel top quality like the few Staub pieces I have, but for the price it seems like a good value!

My package arrived in perfect time, but ended up not even mattering...I open the package to find the main basket, the hanging parts for the door, and the entire right side were smashed in, bent, uneven, and completely damaged. What a dissappointment..was looking forward to this!

Temperature seems to work well but be aware the bottom is sharp metal. I used to use a standard candy thermometer with the bulb on the end and I wasn't worried about scratching my non stick pans when clipping it in. With this one I have to be way more careful to avoid scratches.

It seemed to be a great product I have used it once. But since using it we are unable to get it unscrewed and use it again. My partner is very muscular and strong and despite his best attempts could not get it open this rendering it unusable.  I am saddened by this.

The idea of a fully automatic machine really appealed to me. I have a gaggia classic espresso machine and a rocky rancillio grinder that have seen heavy use over the past 4 years. I was interested in this for speeding up the process of making my morning lattes.

I tried several times to use this machine consistently, but I could never get the espresso or the frother to work as well as the manual machines. So I always ended up frustrated and went back to my trusty old manual setup. Specifically, I couldn’t get good creama on my espresso and the frother barely made any microfoam. No matter what I tried, I couldn’t get this to make lattes how I like them.

The assembled chair is a decent quality, rolls smoothly, and is comfortable. It feels solid and looks like a pretty typical office chair. It did take about an hour to assemble and some of the screws were hard to align with the pre drilled holes. Once it was assembled though, I was happy with it.

When I purchased these, I thought I ordered the set with a black top and gold sheer panel, in an attempt to match a black, gold, and copper bed set.  I was wrong.  I received curtains with a dark brown top and sheer tan panels.  I hung the curtains in the room anyway, and was beyond amazed at how well they worked out!
A bit stiff and doesn't yield at all when reclining.
Softness n/a as they are pillow covers.

The hangers look nice and sturdy; should work for heavier garments.  The only complaint is some of the hangers are off balance so a couple in each set stick up above the rest by a few inches when hanging.

This clock is very cheaply made and it arrived with scratches on it as though it were used. I would have returned it but I bought it at the last minute for my child to take to a Summer program. I'd but something else. Not worth the money AT ALL.

I know the gel is supposed to make it cool.  This blanket is soft and holds my sheet down over me so that I don't need a heavier blanket, so I guess in that way it is cooler.  It could be a little larger.
Arrived with frays and color is more dirty white or possibly pale gray -- while pearl ends are smaller and true pearl white.  Returned this one.
Looks nice, that's about it. Microfiber pills and isn't soft.
I purchased two sets.  One set was fine. The other, the collor of the pump bottle is wonky, and the pump won’t attach.
The knives slip over the back edge of the container.

I bought this bc I have boxes under my bed and wanted a underskirt to cover it.
Out of the package, the bed skirt was filled with dust. I had to bring it outside to shake out all the lint and dust on it.
The material is very light and thin.
Also another thing I noticed was the bed skirt tends to move a lot. I have a queen size bed. I placed it perfectly before putting my bed on it. After a few days. 1 side is long than the other. I personally had higher hopes.
The color was what I wanted and it was easy to setup.
Not as plush and I thought it would be but still very nice.

I was given a project of matching a throw to the same color of my parents living room furniture which is a sort of combined mint/sage green...almost a sage/seafoam with less blue. Very hard to find. After searching all of sites I gave Amazon a go...and found this throw within 5 min of searching. When it arrived I was pleasantly surprised at the quality of the throw based on what I paid for it. Very few times do you get such a lovely bargain like this. The color was as close to perfect as I'll be able to find without using fabric from the sofa and was very much appreciated when the gift was opened. My reputation of being the Family Retrieval expert is saved!
Knives came loose from handles. Dangerous.
Once again a disappointment in a pillow purchase. These are NOT good side sleeper pillows as there is zero support. My neck hurt more after sleeping.

Holy cats are these useless pillows. Yea, I knew they were down but I figured they'd be soft enough to use on my bed. Nope. The cotton is very heavy which makes arranging the pillow to where you want it darn near impossible. I thought ok, I'd use them for couch pillows. IMPOSSIBLE! You go to sit down and lean on them and the feathers poke thru making it very difficult to get comfy. I'd send them back but a) I won't go in to any store to return right now due to Covid & b) it'd cost too much to make it worth while to have UPS pick them up. Guess I'm just stuck with them.
This clock is beautiful. We just remodeled our bathroom and this is a lovely addition!

Bought a two pack of these and they’re working well. We bought a couch that reclines but doesn’t have a table in the middle. There’s no spot to put a drink! This product definitely solves that. They are incredibly cheap though. You get what you pay for. If you want something cheap and for short term, these will do the job.

i'm very happy with the quality (so far) of the material and feel of this sheet set.
The tip to removing the smell & scratchiness (its sizing which some people like) is to wash the set first time with a cup or more of white vinegar.
i did that in hot water and everything came out perfectly! Remember this is all cotton so Expect wrinkles (in fact that's a good test that the fabric is 100%cotton lol). (Microfiber will always be the smoothest but also the hottest.)
anyway love the mid-century vibe of the design and the material is alittle thicker so it has a bit of burlap (without the itch lol) feel--but in a good way.
For much softer sheets (but also alittle thinner too) try this set: Amazon Brand – Stone & Beam Remy 100% Cotton Sateen Bed Sheet Set, Queen, Cloud

Needed a new shower curtain and choice this bc it was on sale. The look is nice and no build up of mildew as of yet. I especially like the magnets on the bottom of the curtain to stick to the sides so water doesnt leave the tub.
The description or picture do NOT do this justice. This is the single most beautiful piece of table linen. A big downside is that it is hand wash only and you need a light iron.

Other reviews have mentioned the wrinkles in the tablecloth that don't come out. That is true, but I still give the tablecloth 4 stars because it is pretty sturdy, cleans easily, and fits the table well. It does what I need it to do. I also like the bright colors available.

Unfortunately, it's ugly, but it works great.  This is an awesome solution when a coffee table or end table aren't feasible.  The five cup design appears to resist tipping even when the sofa is being bounced on.
Died after two uses? Returned.
The table was easy to setup. It's sturdy on the floor and I like the open leg room. It's a perfect height for sitting on a sofa. It also has a lot of room for books, notebook and laptop.

I was pleasantly suprised with this rug.  I was looking for a low pile rug, but wasn't expecting it to be so soft!  We've bought a number of Safavieh rugs, which are always good quality and seem to standup to the abuse of years of use.
Overall good -- but plot is thin and wish there had been more artwork similar to outside envelope.

The cabinet did not have an unusual or even noticeable smell. It looks beautiful and seems well made. I was able to unpack it and screw the legs on myself. I put some tiered candles and a plant on top, and hung a distressed mirror on the wall above. I'm using it for my entry way. I love it!
It gets four stars because the distressing on the top could have been done a little better.
The sharpening stones are so so.
I get more complements for having a flask in my purse. This is the perfect size for a pick-me-up or to 'gird your loins' moment. The only downside is there is no funnel so you need a steady hand.

This was so hard to assemble, I haven't been able to assemble it in full. I followed the instructions and put the tabletop on wrong because the stickers on it indicated that was how to do it. (I got another to put in my office, but it's still in its box because of my negative experience with the first one.) The very heavy tabletop takes two people to attach and there's a ton of small screws, so taking it off and putting it on correctly is a huge project. Someone has to hold onto the heavy tabletop while the other deals with the screws like they're a mechanic making his way under a car.

I bought this product because it was $1 cheaper than the MadeSmart product, which I had bought in the past and liked.  Unlike the MadeSmart product getting this thing to stay together as one tray was difficuly and the end result looks sloppy.
What is this? Not pure Paola Santo! It made the house smell like dill pickles. Waste of $

I used this for a birthday card. I had my sister open it outside and we are both happy about that as these are messy. I am still finding little stars however from when I opened the package. Store in an airtight container as they WILL try to escape! Lol

I was excited to get table for my bed and laptop and that excitement lasted about 25 minutes after I set it up. I noticed it swaying, the bridge support on the left side had popped out, either not glued well or should have had deeper holes to slide into. I thought "fine i'll pop it back in" well it kept happening no matter howc careful I was and its practically useless now because every small nudge could send it, and whatever I have on it crashing to the floor.

Ontop of this I noticed a screw from no where on my bed, and it wans't until I stepped on and cut my foot upen on a second one I realized they were loosely drilled in and had fall out with ease. Well now i have a bloody bottom of my foot and I'm not sure if I need tetanus shot.

This i remind you was within 48 hours of use. Who knows what would have fallen to the floor or hurt me next..

Poor or defective unit or the whole design is cheap.
It is a sharp peeler but a little to bulky for my liking. Probably perfect for someone who has difficulty gripping.
Handles were a little large and big around but still easy to hold.  Very attractive and nice looking, great for the formal dinner look I was going for.

I am not impressed. We bought two of these rugs for our bathroom. The first day we lay the rugs down, we notice one is fraying pretty badly. Quality is low.
Another disappointment is how long these stay wet. I would not re-buy these. We'll use them in our apartment and toss when we move out.
The only plus on these is that they do look nice.
The suction on this isn’t the greatest.

Product came with plastic wrapper which appeared to have melted to the product leaving a sticky residue on it. Also, inside both lids there is a plastic piece with the rubber seal. This was loose and rattling around, which seemed like the lids would not provide a tight seal. I read both positive and negative reviews of this product before I purchases and took a risk. Sadly, this product went back into the back within 5 min of opening and I processed my return. Never even tried the product as the lids appeared to be defective and I didn't want to take another risk and have something leak all over creating a giant mess. Do not buy this product.

I guess from the other reviews I was expecting something different. While these are nice they aren't exactly 'finest quality'. The pairs I received had a very rough feeling at the end where it would go in your mouth. I'm not a fan of splinters on my tongue. The box is nice but impractical for storage. I have had other laminated wood chopsticks that were better quality. They did clean easy but that isn't surprising with the lacquer finish.
My daughter loved them

Stinks like fish water, will not use any longer. It stunk up my yeti as well. Water tasted like crap, in less then 2 weeks.
Not worth the cost.
Works woderfully.  It light weight, and very bright (perhaps a bit too bright).
Not worth your money! Do not buy!
Item was a gift. It was well received.

I immediately threw all of these in the dishwasher hoping they wouldn't all melt but it was fine. These are working great so far. Glad I don't have to throw away as many straws now. I do wish there was different lengths. I have some shorter cups that I normally would cut down a plastic straw for.
I will post in the future if the dishwasher destroys them after a few washes.
It does seal tight on the yeti large containers, but does not allow to use the yeti straws. It will not fit through the hole. I had to buy smaller straws.

I was really excited to receive this record holder so I could finally have a display for all of my vinyls, however upon opening the box I saw that it had been packaged with damaged pieces.
Both of the acrylic ends are deeply scraped which isn’t very noticeable once assembled it’s still the fact they cane packaged that way. The outer box and the packaging it cans in where fine so it makes me think they were damaged at the manufactures. Also the instructions printed inside the box are so hard to read you basically just have to wing it.
Attempted to put unit together but the pre drilled holes are so off and crooked that the screws don't go in all the was causing them to stick out and the whole unit to sit a bit slanted. Honestly not worth the money or hassle should've just spent the extra $10 for a fully acrylic one.

I purchased this for my bathroom. I like how it was easy to place, self explanatory. However, when I came in 1 hour later it was found on the floor. Maybe its the wall material but other plastic suctions have worked in the past.
These are so beautiful. I got so many compliments on my mantle this year. I live them so much I don't want to take them down!!

I bought this wok for easy home cooking. I am korean and make a decent amount of fried rice with eggs and kimchi. It is extremely easy to clean. Cooks the food well. But after 1 month I started to notice very minor scratches coming off from the wok. But no big deal to me.

If you are carrying light loads with no pointy edges, these bags are for you.

If you are carrying medium to heavy loads with boxes, and cardboard/plastic packaging then these bags just won't cut it. The handles are too thin. The bags themselves are just too thin, cheap, tear easy, and fall apart due to disintegration of the recycled plastic. They literally turn into plastic dust. Do not store them in your car, they will turn into dust even faster.

Save yourself some grief and buy thicker/heavy duty bags.

In general I like this clock. I purchased it for my 3 yr old learning to use a real bed so I wanted the changing lights in the morning. Asthetically it’s the simplest and nicest looking option I found on amazon.
However I HATE the nightlight feature. The face of the clock can be set a variety of colors using the nightlight setting. I thought I’d be able to turn it on and set the color for the face of the clock permanently purple. But every morning when the wake up timer switches the clock to yellow then green, it overrides the nightlight setting and turns it off. So if you want the clock to be lit up a fun color every day and night, you have to manually turn the light back on every morning. Even though it’s not that huge of a deal, it’s annoying for a clock that cost $50 and you hope would be perfect.
Was looking for new bath tube mats. Good price. Like the different colors. Value packs. Easy to clean. good suction.
Inexpensive and works exactly as needed. No complaints here.

I have a family member with a lung disorder and bought this to keep the air clean. To better his health.
The problems I've had:
The machine keeps saying the air is not clean. And it goes in high mode more hours and hours. Never goes down. It gets annoying after it being on the high level for hours on end. Ive tried cleaning the sensor but it did not help. Maybe the one I got was defective. But this is the problem I've had with mine.

Bought this for my wife, she has friends that come over and they drink wine and have snacks for a get together. The material is well made. Looks of good quality. Comes with different cutting and eating utensils.
However takes some time to clean. Takes up a lot of counter space so u need a big kitchen counter when drying it.

I received a portable ac with no window mount. This fit great with my tubing. It was easy to setup. The design is simple yet effective. There are small gaps between the three pieces. Its easy to fix with some tape. The measurements is exact as descibed. My summer is going to be cool.
Bigger than I thought and hold a ton of groceries. Well made and strong too! Animals designs are adorable !
Don't like how thin this product is, and it is harder to keep clean.

I used this for a couple of weeks in my kitchen. I don't have a compost pile, but when I found out it takes over a year to make compost, it lost its appeal for that purpose. Instead, I'm using it as a small trash pail next to the toilet in my bathroom. It's the perfect size to use every month. (Sorry for being gross, but it's the truth, Ruth!)

Update 8/22 after a few months of use 4-5 times per week:
The pan is still very non stick, the pan hardly has signs of wear. I’ve only used wooden/plastic utensils in it and there are a few light scratches on the bottom of the pan, but they haven’t damaged the non stick coating and are not even apparent enough to be captured well with a picture. I have noticed browning underneath the handle from the gas flame. It doesn’t bother me and doesn’t come off, but it may bother some!!

Original review: So far I’ve made fried rice, eggs, one pot pasta, and cooked chicken and sausage in this pan. Not a single bit has stuck even though I like to take minimal oil while cooking! Also cleaning the pot has been super easy, both because nothing has stuck to it in the first place, and because the pan is pretty lightweight. I like the fun colors and have been enjoying this pan. It doesn’t feel top quality like the few Staub pieces I have, but for the price it seems like a good value!
These came horribly tarnished and looking so bad I would be embarrassed to put these on my table.
It’s fine for a quick fix. I used two cans and my tree looked more green / gray dusted than flocked. It’s not as bright snowy white as pic. A bit messy but cleans easily. Cans clog easily.

After reading all the reviews I was reluctant to purchase this juicer but threw in the towel after weeks of research lead me to exhaustion. I should've kept with the research cause this machine is a hassle and a half.

First there is a little flip portion cup in the chute which is beyond annoying for all produce except celery. I managed to pop it out for actual use of the wide chute.
Speaking of celery, even if you do chop it down the fibers still get stuck in the waste chute and are a pain to clean out. Towards the end of making my juices I noticed the strainer was so compacted with produce bits that it stopped pressing juice and was just whirling around a medley of mashed up produce affecting the juice yield.
After my first batch of juice I rinsed out the machine and prepped my produce for my second batch of juice giving the machine time to rest and cool off. As I finished up the second batch of juice my machine began making a clicking noise which also seems to be a common issue. The machine has only made two batches of juice and its already making loud clicking noises!? I know they say you get what you pay for but $90 for a juicer that only lasts for 2 batches of juice is ridiculous. Do not recommend especially if you like to make juice in advance because after only a small amount of produce the juicer essentially stops juicing and just creates apple sauce.

I bought this for the winter time. It was easy to put on and keeps most of the air that comes through the ac vent. If I sit next to the ac I can feel a tad breeze when it is very windy and cold outside.
Beautiful and great price!

...the colors that are shown aren't true IRL. I got the green which had shown more of a lighter, sage green but when it came it was a darker Kelly green. Still, it's a beautiful throw it was just too dark for what I bought it for. If there were more color options I'd consider getting another color for myself as it was a nice throw.
You can’t keep the clear plastic curtain on in the inside it will continuously fall off!
I returned this item because of the poor quality.  I also reviewed it but Amaxzon rejected the review for some reason.  I thought the qualit was very poor.

This does the job. It looks nice. We replaced our last one because it was so grimy and rusted. The only difference from our last one is this one is much shorter! Good thing we have other spots in the shower to put our shampoo/conditioner. It still works but... I probably wouldn’t rebuy this product
It was not as advertised. These were gifts and I  had no time to retur and exchange.

These straws are fine but not as long as I was expecting. I buy the same brand and color scheme from Bed Bath and Beyond and they are maybe 1/2 in longer, which allows me to use with my Tervis cups. These straws are too short for use with large Tervis tumblers

I immediately washed this full/queen comforter in my top load washer and then threw it in the dryer on low heat to see how it would wash. It washed really well and came out cozier and less wrinkly than when it went in. I then put in on my daughter’s full size bed. It is a good size for her bed, a smidge big on the sides but fits similarly to other full/queen sizes. It does have ever so slightly peach undertones. I wish it was slightly more blush/pale pink as I was hoping, but that’s always hard to tell from a picture.

Overall I’m impressed with they way this washed and the coziness of the comforter. It’s a nice medium weight that is neither too thin or hot. I typically get my kids bedding from pottery barn kids, and I truly think this is comparable in quality and cuteness.
So much prettier than the picture!!!
This is beautiful. A prefect spring/summer comforter. I feel  like i brought my garden into my bedroom! I love it.

Love these. Color is so bright and vibrant. Just throw in the washing machine to clean.

This is great when guests come over for a party or dinner. Since I only have 1 bathroom, guests or myself might feel a little embarrassed after using the restroom and leaving a smell. This is good to have something like this not occur. Very easy to use, use a couple of sprays before doing your business and one can hardy tell what went on in there. I do really like this vacuum, it has a good battery, good attachments and I like the extendable hose. But I would personally only want to pay $60-$75 tops for it. This Bissell does seem to have a bit longer battery life (a few minutes more perhaps) and is just slightly better at cleaning my car, but it doesn’t seem twice as good (like the current $100 price).

These do not fit Kerr or Ball jars.
So frustrating.

The product worked well, but was slow.  Unfortunately, 6 months after buying it, and only having used it a half dozen times it quit.  It started smoking (while grinding cooked sweet potato), and kept smoking several minutes after unplugging it.
Expected it to be a lot bigger.
I'm sorry but it was a very poor fit

Got lumpy. I really loved how the pillow was at the hotel. So I wanted to buy one for myself. To save money I just bought the standard. I still use it but it got lumpy and flat. Maybe I should have bought the king size. I would avoid the standard.

Initially the robot vacuum was easy to setup and easy to use. I liked the style and ease of the remote control. Very simple to start it up and the vacuum would go back to its charger when it's done. However I would have to watch the vacuum when using it bc when I would leave it alone it would miss a lot of the surface area of the apartment. If it would hit a piece of a leg on a furniture, the area around the leg would not get cleaned. Then I would need to redo the vacuuming again with a standard vacuum bc there would still be dust and hair.

I've bought the brand of pillow case many times, and keep coming back.  The pillow cases are soft and don't irritate my skin.  They wash up nicely, for silk; which takes a little extra care, but so worth it.
Cheap and falls apart, after first wash! Small! Sheds

Dont infuse as well others.  Hold up well however.
Nothing special.

This is an amazing blender. I use it for home use to make simple smoothies to sauces. The blending power is very strong. Fairly easy to clean. It is loud but bc the blender is so strong your only blending for a short time. The blender makes ice cubes into nice shaved ice.
Worked how expected. Great price
item came without screws.
This is the 2nd one of these I've bought.  It works great, the adhesive doesn't quit.  The mirror only lasts about 5 years, before needing to be replaced, which is great, given the price.

This is a lot thinner than I anticipated but it still works. I use it as a cover for my nightstand. It won't last as long as my last but at under $7 what would you expect? The print is a machine pressed design on super light cotton. It is a lot brighter than shown but the Mandela is still pretty.

I recently bought my daughter the Thermos Funtainer 10oz with folding spoon to take soup to school for lunches, it was $16.99. It has worked well but I love all of my hydro flask water bottles so I was excited to try this. I tested them out this morning side by side. I started out by filling them both with hot tap water to warm up the metal insides while I boiled water. I dumped the tap water and then filled them both with boiling water (temp was 210 degrees). I sealed them tightly and left them on the counter for 4 hours. I then took the temperature of the water. The hydro flask water was 137 degrees and the Thermos Funtainer water was 151 degrees. I could actually see a small bit of steam coming out of the Thermos container and couldn’t see anything coming from the HydroFlask. The HydroFlask feels more substantial at first (it weighs 13 oz and the Thermos weighs 9oz), but the lid for the Thermos is bulkier and I guess that’s why the Thermos retains heat better.
Overall neither leak and my 6 year old can take off and put on the lid to both, so they are both easy enough for small kids to use. But when it comes to heat retention and price, Thermos wins.
The plastic cup the star sits on top of split when I stuck a tree branch inside for balance. I discarded the cup and carefully place the star on top. Sits sideways, but it’s stable

I wanted to use this to eat healthier. However, my air fryer compartment was unable to close properly. Not sure if this was the reason my food always came out burnt on the top portion. I've followed directions to cook different recipes but the air fryer did not work well with my cooking. I can see how this will make food healthier and ease for cooking.
Don’t waste your time. This is the cheapest fabric on the planet parading as a reindeer rug. Sad, really.
Good bowls but they have small defects in the glaze that make them somewhat disappointing.
Great product. Ive ordered them 3x now. I love having them to take when traveling or the gym. We use them everyday! Highly recommend!

They said this was going to be a really thick blanket and Superior Quality the blanket I purchased in October was half the price a much thicker and a better quality it's a beautiful blanket love the pattern that was one of the things that intrigue me about it sorely disappointed with the quality of it not worth the price I paid but I'll keep it none the less because I don't feel like shipping it back but the one I purchased earlier for $19 was a far superior and thicker blanket

I use a lot of cilantro and typically just chop up the stems because I don’t want to take the time to remove the leaves. In about 30 seconds I can use this tool to remove the majority of the leaves, and only a few of the stems come with the leaves. (See picture) The tool seems priced right to me for the quality and job it does.
Bent up and crooked upon purchase. Can barely fit and books, or much of anything for this matter. Got a refund for this. Dont waste your time; you get what you pay for, I guess.

I like everything about this heated mattress pad EXCEPT the plug at the foot of the bed, which is why I gave it only 3 stars.  My feet constantly run into the plus, and it's hard.  Needs to be redesigned and I will definitely pay better attention next time.  Otherwise, it's fine . . . but that's enough of a NO for me.

My husband purchased this for me as a gift as I have a HUGE collection of cosmetics and was out of storage. I have another couple acrylic pieces but this one is definitely my favorite. Not only is the clear acrylic very flattering as a cosmetic storage, but the drawers are very deep, wide and long, providing a ton of room in each drawer. For the top piece, I actually keep the lid open and use it to store my tall items (such as perfume bottles and smaller storage containers). The lid folds all the way back and lays flush with it, so it works perfectly. I also have not had any problems with the drawers opening/closing...like I have with other acrylic pieces like this. Over all, very, very happy with this item and will definitely purchase another if needed.
Cheap material. Not soft. Had a stain when arrived. It is an expensive pillow form for the price. I do not recommend.
Great at first but already broken. Less than 5 months of barely any use. What a bummer
Works as advertised.  It's a nice clear stand that lets the art shine.
I got a dark brown runner for my hallway and a smaller one for my front door! The color is beautiful and they don’t slide all over! Definitely worth the money!
I use this to keep medication, medical products under my bed. Decent enough size and very easy to move around. Not recommended for heavy items, or dont overload it. It wont last that long.
Cheap crap.  All plastic.  I would not recommend!
This rice cooker broke after the third time I used it. When it did work it was good but I bought 2 and they both broke within the 3rd use :(
Not nearly as nice as others I have bought for the same price at bed bath and beyond.

Smaller than expected. Can not use without lid. Ordered this for my mother because she has trouble gripping her drinks, but she doesn't like using lids. There are groves around the inner top of the cup to screw the lid on. I returned this.

I like that it’s sturdy and a great true shade of gray. Some of the parts did not screw in tightly ( just kept spinning)  Also some paint scratched off that I had to touch up with paint I had already :(

Ok, so I recently got a set of LaRochere bee glasses that are about the same thickness of glass. The thing is, they have this so-so seam that runs thru them & they tell me this is 'normal' and part of their 'brand'. Meanwhile, for about a third of the cost I get two of these glasses & they are absolutely PERFECT. They are thick, sturdy, stylish and again PERFECT for what I wanted. I should've tried this brand before LaRochere!! These are sublime. Great size for a double old-fashioned or hey, for a really bad day having 3 fingers of Oban. You will NOT be disappointed with these glasses. In point of fact....I'm ordering more!

I used this for my kitchen window. It was not so easy to install. It was difficult to get the screws into the wall and have the curtain become leveled.
After leveling the screws. I noticed the bar or rod that holds the curtain was not even. When I would roll it on the floor. The rod was not evenly made. Contacted customer service but did not get much help.

My preschoolers like this and it has good sized sections for food, but it could be half as deep to fulfill our needs. The deep ness makes it harder to dip, use a spoon, and clean. Also it takes up unnecessary room. Other than that we like it.

Not the quality I would expect, plant products embedded in stitching, even after washing.  A bit disappointed, will use to clean with, not for dishes, they may might scratch anything you want to handwash..
Absolutely not what’s pictured. So small. No support.

My 7 year old and I have been eyeing the cute decorated mason jars from the colormadehappy blog. When I saw these, I thought they’d be perfect for her since they obviously wouldn’t break like glass. After I opened them though, I’ve been debating for the past week whether or not to waste paint on these or to just go buy glass ones, which I could get 12 for $12 at Walmart.

These feel pretty thin and cheap. The metal lid is only one piece (unlike glass ones with the two piece lids), and the metal is super thin. One lid was bent when I opened the box. I’m sure with actual use they will get more dinged up. Also the small size is very itsy bitsy. Definitely not large enough to hold most art supplies I would like to store, possibly good for sequins or tiny pom poms. Overall I was very unimpressed.
Do not like. Ugly

My guests came out of the bathroom asking for paper towel because they didn't want to mess these up claiming them to be too pretty.
They really are super cute but make sure you give them a towels before guests arrive or they won't use them! Super cute!!!
I guess it's a great towel if your a kid, but for adults its very short & thin. Not a great pool towel.
They blend in nicely with stone counters.  They have a sturdy solid surface with a nice cork backing that is easy on counters.  They are super easy to clean and stand up to a scrub brush.
The flowers are ok but so far spaced apart it is difficult to hang. The best you can do is deal them. The battery case was cracked and they don't light up too brightly.
Does not work. They ripped with in a few weeks.

This is the second comforter ordered. The first exceeded ever expectation and I was so thrilled, I got new second for my bed, this time a king. Well...I want to know who measured this. It is the same size as my queen sized. I have a large queen bed which is why I ordered a king. I wake to no covers because it slipped off the bed as it is too short. It's a decent spring/fall comforter for here in the South where it rarely gets too cold.
These are super cute but extremely tiny. Not usable for my storefront like expected.
It cleans well. I like that the solution is separate from where the hot water goes. I wish it had a little more suction.

This clock is way smaller then expected. It's about the size of a dollar bill. Not what I was looking for. This was a gift for someone who needs no bells or whistles and us SUPER user friendly.  This is not that clock.

This is not an air conditioner by any stretch of the imagination.  Is is a very small fan that is the size of your hand to blow in your face.  It is quiet, and does blow a little air.  Don't expect much.
The shelves work perfectly for our need.  They were easy to install, and don't look terrible.
Easy to use and a perfect  size! Definitely recommend!
I LOVE this air fryer. I use it for everything. Food takes half the time to cook and I dont need to turn on my large oven. Fits right on the counter too. Highly recommend.
These lids are not Pyrex brand. While they do fit, they're cheap. Mine are already cracking/tearing in less than a month of use.

I do love the soft air mesh material of this bath pillow, and the zigzag pattern is relaxing to look at! The suction cups seem to exhibit reliable adherence, and the pillow does easily hang up by the attached plastic hook for necessary airing out post-bath. Even if the pillow gets completely submerged in water during use, it still seems to dry fairly quickly. It did arrive to me folded in half, but I suspect it was easier to ship it that way. I will say that the padding feels less than substantial, so it doesn’t provide an optimally cushiony bath experience, but it never promised to be a premium item to begin with. There are definitely squishier tub pillows on the market, but this ergonomically shaped one still provides a certain level of appreciable comfort.

At the time this review was posted, this product had a list price of $14.88 on the product page. I do believe that price was already showing reflection of a recent decrease, and that value seems reasonably appropriate for this item and what it can offer.

[[VIDEOID:727bde6c5643d08d6d6c27edbb9d300d]] Adorable picture. If you look closely at the bottom (kida hard to see framed... thank God), there is a crease. This was a gift.  There was no warning to NOT BEND on the packaging and was delivered to our mail box.  My son did what he could to get rid of the creases.

Light weight super cute quilted bedspread.
Queen size Fits my standard queen mattress & low platform base nicely.

I washed at first in hot water with a cup of white vinegar (to cleanse out the sizing chemicals) and then dried everything (quilt & shams) on med high heat for 45 minutes.
Everything came out perfectly & soft with no wrinkles and nothing shrank!
The blue flower pattern is interesting & I have a few fun craft ideas to make it pop.

Sure, it fits nicely in a corner but the price is your hearing. This is a very loud fan. The lowest speed doesn't blow much so you need to put on at least 2. There is no remote control. It does an ok job with moving air.

This was purchased to camouflage an area on my patio. I had needed something that could be kept outdoors and expected to get a plastic fern. This is NOT plastic but silk. I'm not sure yet whether this will be able to hold up to the weather and may be back to edit this review. So far though, it looks like I have a very healthy, very real Boston Fern on my patio. It's so real in fact it is visited daily by the wrens to 'steal' pieces from it. When they can't detach a piece they will sit on the rail of my patio & yell at the window. It has also become a home to a nest of garden spiders so be aware......nature apparently can't tell if its live or if it's Memorex!

I typically love Yankee Candles. And I also typically love frosting or cupcake or vanilla based scents. But this one is pretty gross. Not just like “oh, I don’t prefer that,” but more like “this smells medicinal.” It reminds me of the pink “bubble gum” amoxicillin from my childhood. I’m not going to attempt burning it either. Unless you’ve smelled this in a store, I would not risk purchasing this online.

I like how these glasses cover all sides of my eyes. It works well for cutting onions, but definitely gives me a sense of security when working in hospital and taking care of patients. These are better than a splash guard or the laboratory googles. Also looks stylish.

Update: after using this for 2 weeks, I noticed they get very foggy. Not recommended to be used with a mask bc it will fog up. However for onion cutting it may be fine.

My kids currently have pottery barn kids lunch boxes, and those are both wider, deeper and have an exterior water bottle holder, so they fit a lot more. There are a couple Oxo divided containers we like to use, and even a large one with 3 sections (a large sandwich section and 2 sides) can be squished down in their PBK ones, and then there is room to fit ice packs and additional snacks on the top. This hydro flask one is simply too small and rigid for our needs. I think it would maybe work if you use a lot of ziplock bags, or if you plan on a small lunch for a toddler, but don’t plan on getting any sizable containers in this. I could basically fit a small container that would hold two sides, and there wasn’t even room left to squish the water bottle in there. I think it would end up being too small for most elementary kids.
I ordered the black/green duvet cover, and it is solid green.  NOT reversible.
Snags on everything.

I have discovered the secret to a great grilled cheese, perfect sauteed mushrooms and the best flapjacks; a good Lodge cast iron pan. I still use my stainless steel but it now shares space with old fashioned cast iron.
So easy to care for! It is pre-seasoned so you don't have to worry about doing it the right way. Instantly nonstick. Do yourself a favor and get a couple. They are a great and affordable addition to your cookware.
Wow! Not even big enough for a Twinkie!!! Soooo disappointed

Honestly, I've been trying to find a salt and pepper shaker set that 1) actually shakes salt and pepper out at a reasonable rate, 2) is each to refill, and 3) looks good.  Is that really too much to ask?  This set wins on #'s 2 and 3.  Problem is, it's made so the top on the salt turns so you can pour smaller or larger salt, but mine stops and won't move from the small salt only.  If I turn it in the direction that moves the cap to go to another option, it comes completely unscrewed from the part that contains the salt.  So, if I want to use larger salt, I can but I just have to unscrew the cap.
